mapper.select: SELECT f.facility_id, f.facility_name, f.depth, f.upper, f.asset_master_id, f.inspection_yn, f.photo_mandatory_yn, f.display_yn, f.use_yn, f.created_at, p.facility_name as upper_name FROM facility f LEFT JOIN facility p ON f.upper = p.facility_id WHERE f.asset_master_id = #{assetMasterId} AND f.delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY f.depth ASC, f.facility_id ASC
